text:
Three separate arson attacks targeting France's high-speed rail network paralyzed train travel nationwide on Friday as Paris prepared to host the opening ceremony for the 2024 Olympics. It remains unclear who was responsible for the attacks or if they were timed to disrupt the event.

title: 'Sabotage' on French rail network before Olympics: What we know so far - The Economic Times
description: Three separate arson attacks targeting France's high-speed rail network paralyzed train travel nationwide on Friday as Paris prepared to host the opening ceremony for the 2024 Olympics. It remains unclear who was responsible for the attacks or if they were timed to disrupt the event.
